Fixture workbooks are generated by `tests/fixtures/generate_fixtures.py`. Run the script to refresh the `.xlsx` files before updating goldens under `tests/fixtures/expected/`.

`serves_multi.txt` is a hand-authored text fixture that uses "Serves" lines to delimit recipes without explicit section headers.
`sectioned_components_recipe.txt` is a hand-authored text fixture for multi-component section headers (`For the meat`, `For the gravy`) used by section-aware parsing/staging tests.

`tests/fixtures/epub_html/` contains synthetic XHTML snippets for EPUB unstructured tuning regressions (BR-split ingredients/instructions, nested lists, and faux headings).
